demographics.living_situation: lives at home with his wife; they share a bed and living spaces

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The itching is absolute torture the second I get into bed. I've scratched my arms and stomach completely raw, and now my wife has started itching too. I haven't slept properly in three days and I'm at my wit's end.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itch is unbearable at night and nothing over the counter has touched it — it's been three days of no sleep and now my wife's got it as well, so I need something that actually works.

symptom_narrative.onset: it crept in about three weeks ago as a few itchy bumps, but over the last five days it's turned into a non-stop, agonising itch
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 3 weeks, dramatically worse for the last 5 days
symptom_narrative.character: an intense, deep itch with little bumps; the skin is scratched raw in places and bleeding where I can't leave it alone
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst itch I've ever had — it's worst at night and completely stops me sleeping
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my wrists, my tummy around the belly button, my armpits and my thighs — and it's itchy down below too
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: far worse at night once I'm warm in bed; it eases a little during the day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — the antihistamines from the chemist did absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: getting into a warm bed at night, and the more I scratch the rawer it gets
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm completely wiped out from no sleep, and honestly a bit wound up and stressed about it
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: the lack of sleep is affecting my work and my concentration; I feel exhausted all day

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally fit and well, nothing ongoing

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter antihistamine tablets I bought myself — they haven't helped at all

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with his wife; they share a bed and close living spaces, and she has now started itching over the last day or two

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: He wants effective relief so he can finally sleep, and he is worried about what this is, whether he has passed it to his wife, and whether it will keep spreading.

communication_style.typical_message_style: frustrated and exhausted; describes the itch vividly, keeps returning to the sleep loss and the fact his wife now has it, and wants a concrete fix

objective_data_offered.value: widespread little red itchy bumps with lots of scratch marks across the wrists, tummy, armpits and thighs; some spots scratched raw with pinpoint bleeding
a few tiny thread-like greyish lines in the skin between the fingers, and some itchy lumps in the groin area
no fever — I took my temperature at home and it was normal, and I don't feel hot or shivery
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-taken home thermometer reading, not clinician-measured

objective_data_offered.value: my wife has started getting the same itchy bumps and night-time itch over the last day or two
